ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Conference, Workshop, Seminar) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the event is held */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the event is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer responsible for the event */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the event */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees for the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the organizer represents */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the organizer's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the speaker */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the speaker */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the speaker's photo */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the speaker's profile picture */,
  "speaking_experience" INTEGER /* Speaking experience of the speaker (in years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "talks" (
  "talk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each talk */,
  "talk_title" TEXT /* Title of the talk or session */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event where the talk is presented */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker presenting the talk */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the talk */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the talk */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the talk */,
  "materials_url" TEXT /* URL to the materials (e.g., slides, handouts) for the talk */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Brief abstract of the talk */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for attending the talk */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the talk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("talk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talks_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talks_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the attendee registered for the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the attendee is attending */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., General Admission, VIP) */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the attendee represents */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the attendee's ticket (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the attendee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "talk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the talk or session */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date the talk is scheduled */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Time the talk is scheduled */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the talk (e.g., Room 101, Auditorium) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the talk (e.g., Scheduled, Cancelled, Rescheduled) */,
  "room_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room where the talk is scheduled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_talk_id FOREIGN KEY ("talk_id") REFERENCES talks ("talk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being reviewed */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "talk_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "talk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the talk being rated */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talk_ratings_talk_id FOREIGN KEY ("talk_id") REFERENCES talks ("talk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talk_ratings_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)
